task_001.output:
Based on the search results, the three most recent SpaceX launches are:

1. SpaceX launched 119 payloads to orbit on a single Falcon 9 rocket (Monday, March 30, 2026)
2. A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a batch of 25 Starlink V2 Mini Optimized satellites into low Earth orbit. (Date not specified)
3. A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a Northrop Grumman Cygnus spacecraft, a cargo vehicle, to the International Space Station. (Date not specified)

task_002.error_message:
Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': "Failed to call a function. Please adjust your prompt. See 'failed_generation' for more details.", 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'code': 'tool_use_failed', 'failed_generation': '<function=python_exec>{"code": "import re
missions = [
    'SpaceX launched 119 payloads to orbit on a single Falcon 9 rocket (Monday, March 30, 2026)',
    'A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a batch of 25 Starlink V2 Mini Optimized satellites into low Earth orbit. (Date not specified)',
    'A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a Northrop Grumman Cygnus spacecraft, a cargo vehicle, to the International Space Station. (Date not specified)'
]
launch_info = []
for mission in missions:
    match = re.search(r'([A-Za-z ]+) launched (\d+) payloads to orbit on a single Falcon 9 rocket \(Monday, ([A-Za-z]+) (\d+), (\d+)\)', mission)
    if match:
        mission_name = match.group(1)
        date = match.group(3)
        month = match.group(4)
        day = match.group(5)
        success_status = 'Success'
        launch_info.append({'Mission Name': mission_name, 'Date': date, 'Month': month, 'Day': day, 'Success Status': success_status})
    match = re.search(r'A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a batch of (\d+) (.*?) into low Earth orbit \(Date not specified\)', mission)
    if match:
        mission_name = 'SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch'
        date = 'Date not specified'
        success_status = 'Success'
        launch_info.append({'Mission Name': mission_name, 'Date': date, 'Success Status': success_status})
    match = re.search(r'A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket will launch a (.*?) spacecraft, a cargo vehicle, to the International Space Station \(Date not specified\)', mission)
    if match:
        mission_name = 'SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch'
        date = 'Date not specified'
        success_status = 'Success'
        launch_info.append({'Mission Name': mission_name, 'Date': date, 'Success Status': success_status})
print(launch_info)"}</function>'}}
